title: Phone Login - Verify successful login with a valid 10-digit phone number
description: Tests the complete happy path for phone number based OTP authentication.
preconditions: User has a valid, active 10-digit Indian mobile number.
User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 1. Enter a valid 10-digit mobile number in the input field.
3. Verify a loading indicator is shown.
4. Verify navigation to the OTP Verification screen.
6. Enter the correct 4-digit OTP in the input fields.
7. Verify a loading indicator is shown upon entering the 4th digit.
8. Verify the user is successfully logged in and navigated to the Home screen.

expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to the Home screen after entering a valid phone number and the correct OTP.
